Natriuretic Peptide Tests (BNP, NT-proBNP) 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/natriuretic-peptide-tests-bnp-nt-probnp/ 
Natriuretic Peptide Tests (BNP, NT-proBNP) 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are natriuretic peptide tests (BNP, NT-proBNP)? 
Natriuretic peptides are proteins that your heart and blood vessels make. Natriuretic peptide tests measure the amount of these proteins in a sample of your blood. They are mainly used to help confirm or rule out heart failure in peo
